binaural_beat_layering.goal: Deep immersive trance state during breaks

shepard_tone_riser_logic.result: Infinite rising tension without frequency capping

psychoacoustic_shaping_rules.missing_fundamental_illusion: Adding harmonics @ 104Hz, 156Hz, 208Hz to make the sub-bass (52Hz) audible on small speakers.
psychoacoustic_shaping_rules.masking_prevention_protocol: Dynamic notch-filtering @ 3kHz (Vocal clarity) triggered by Snare transients.
psychoacoustic_shaping_rules.transient_ear_fatigue_control: Soft-saturation on 2-5kHz region to avoid 'harshness' at high volumes.
